title: One Piece
author: Eiichiro Oda
description: A young pirate sets out to become the Pirate King and find the legendary treasure known as One Piece.

title: Naruto
author: Masashi Kishimoto
description: A loud but determined ninja dreams of becoming Hokage and earning his village's respect.

title: Bleach
author: Tite Kubo
description: Ichigo Kurosaki gains Soul Reaper powers and is drawn into a hidden world of spirits and battles.

title: Berserk
author: Kentaro Miura
description: A wandering swordsman fights through a brutal world shaped by ambition, tragedy, and fate.

title: Monster
author: Naoki Urasawa
description: A brilliant surgeon faces the consequences of saving a boy who grows into a terrifying serial killer.

title: Nana
author: Ai Yazawa
description: Two women named Nana build a complex friendship while navigating love, music, and adulthood.

title: Fruits Basket
author: Natsuki Takaya
description: A kind-hearted girl becomes involved with a family carrying a supernatural zodiac curse.

title: Yona of the Dawn
author: Mizuho Kusanagi
description: A sheltered princess is forced to grow into a determined leader after losing her kingdom overnight.
